scoring_notes.real_yields_correction: CRITICAL: This report corrects the real yields scoring from the 0730 report. The 0730 report used nominal 10Y Treasury yield (4.14%, rising) as a proxy for real yields, scoring them as RISING (-2 raw, -4 weighted for GC). The correct data source is FRED DFII10 (10Y TIPS real yield), which shows 1.831% and FALLING (-0.02pp 1-month per TradingEconomics). This changes GC from -1 NEUTRAL to +6 STRONG_BULLISH, and improves ES/NQ/YM/RTY scores significantly.
scoring_notes.gc_factor_breakdown: GC: Fed(0×1=0) + RealYields(+2×2=+4) + USD(-1×1=-1) + RiskMood(+1×1=+1) + Growth(0×1=0) + OilSupply(+1×1=+1) + GoldETF(+1×1=+1) = +6
scoring_notes.es_factor_breakdown: ES: Fed(0×1=0) + RealYields(+2×2=+4) + USD(-1×1=-1) + RiskMood(+1×1=+1) + Growth(0×1=0) + CreditSpreads(0×1=0) + VIXDir(-1×1=-1) = +3
scoring_notes.ym_factor_breakdown: YM: Fed(0×1=0) + RealYields(+2×1=+2) + USD(-1×1=-1) + RiskMood(+1×1=+1) + Growth(0×2=0) + CreditSpreads(0×1=0) + Curve(+1×1=+1) = +3
scoring_notes.rty_factor_breakdown: RTY: Fed(0×1=0) + RealYields(+2×1=+2) + USD(-1×1=-1) + RiskMood(+1×1=+1) + Growth(0×2=0) + CreditSpreads(0×2=0) + Curve(+1×1=+1) = +3
